title: Crumbly Korean Quinoa Crumbe
description: A fresh, crumbly, light polish dish featuring mixed grains that are crispy and vegan-friendly, perfect for a snack or side dish.
instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold water and cook according to package instructions until tender. Let it cool.
Mix cooked quinoa with rice cake crumbs if using, adding a pinch of salt for flavoring.
Combine mixed grains (amaranth, buckwheat, quinoa) in another bowl.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the mixed grain mixture and cook until lightly toasted.
Fold cooked quinoa into the mixed grain mixture while hot.
